# Flowers (OpenGameArt)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Author** | SpiderDave |
| **License** | [CC0 1.0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/) |
| **Source** | https://opengameart.org/content/flowers |
| **File** | `plants.png` (from `plants_2.png` on OGA) |

78 pixel-art plants (flowers, weeds, fungi, vines, grass, cattails, etc.) on a **12×24** cell grid (sheet 936×24). DawnBringer 32 palette.

Used by Crystalward for Legend-inspired meadow scatter (`scripts/botanical_beauty.gd`).
